prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `edcc2ff0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `edcc2ff0` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: keep only lower-picture objects whose colors match the three header markers, erase every other lower-picture color to the lower background, and expand each header marker horizontally to the number of 4-connected objects of that color remaining below. The summary hint was used only as a cross-check; it matched the official examples, so `notes.md` was not needed. No new reusable primitive was necessary.

Validation passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples via `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task edcc2ff0`, `1000/1000` generated examples via `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task edcc2ff0`, and I visually checked the preview sheets. The generator matches the family by keeping the fixed 20x10 layout, black 7-row header with markers on rows 1/3/5, a bordered 13x10 lower panel, sparse small line/block/L motifs, and removable distractor colors.
